message:
fix: shut down loading server in Shutdown() to prevent port leak on early exit (#3360) (#3390)

If Shutdown() was called before Start(), the temporary loading server was
never closed and kept the port bound. Now Shutdown() checks for and closes
the loading server before tearing down other services.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
